tagline: Goob ku samee repo-gaaga commit kasta.

hero.title: Salaan luqad kasta
hero.lede: Boggan waxaa turjumay Resource Translator laftiisa, mar kasta oo la riixayo main, luqadaha kasta ee Azure AI Translator taageero.

phrases.machine_translated: Waxaa mashiinka lagu turjumay Azure AI Translator.
phrases.open_pull_request: Fur codsi pull ah oo leh turjumaado cusub.
phrases.ship_anywhere: U dir software-kaaga meel kasta oo dhulka ah.
phrases.thank_you: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad isku dayday Resource Translator.

features.reliable: Dib u soo laabasho byte kasta oo faylasha ilahaaga ah.
features.configurable: Cod, warshad, qaamuus, erayo aflagaado — dhammaantood waa la habeyn karaa.
features.ci_native: Waxaa loogu talagalay GitHub Actions iyo workflow-yada codsiyada jiidashada.

footer.powered_by: Waxaa ku shaqeeya Resource Translator iyo Azure AI Translator.
footer.view_translation_pr: Eeg codsiga ugu dambeeyay ee turjumaadda.
